zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Kirkbride於大約1287年出生在英國英格蘭恩布利亞吉可布利德時，他的父親Sir Richard de Kirkbride II23歲，母親Christine De Wigton22歲。他於大約1313年與Alice De Bourdon在英國英格蘭恩布利亞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1336年在英國波藍德享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kirkbride
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (Cumbria): habitational name from a place in Cumbria near Carlisle, named from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + the Irish saint's name Bride (see Kilbride ).

variants.name: Kilbride
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Aidan.

Irish (Connacht) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Brighde (Irish) or Mac Gille Brighde (Scottish) ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Brigit’, also often shortened and Anglicized as McBride . The name Brigit means ‘exalted’. Brigit was originally a pagan goddess, many of whose attributes, such as a sacred fire, became attached to the historical figure of Saint Brigit of Kildare (452–523), founder of the first Irish convent.

Scottish: habitational name from any of various places with this name, from Gaelic Cill Bríghde ‘church of Saint Brigit’ (cill being from Latin cella ‘room, cell’), for example Kilbride in Lanarkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Kirkbride was born about 1287, in Kirkbride, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard de Kirkbride II, was 23 and his mother, Christine De Wigton, was 22. He married Alice De Bourdon about 1313, in Cumbria, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1336, in Cumberland, England, at the age of 50.

Il a épousé Alice De Bourdon environ 1313, à Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1336, à Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Kirkbride(이)가 대략 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 c브리아 커k브라이드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard de Kirkbride II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Christine De Wigton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1313년 영국 잉글랜드 c브리아에서 Alice De Bourdon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1336년 영국 c벌랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.
